**UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES — Periodic Transaction Report**

- NAME: Rohit Khanna
- OFFICE TELEPHONE: 202-225-2631
- [X] Member of the U.S. House of Representatives — State: CA, District: 17 (File an original and 2 copies)
- [ ] Officer or Employee — Employing Office: ____ (File an original and 1 copy)
- Did you purchase any shares that were allocated as a part of an Initial Public Offering? [ ] Yes  [X] No
- Report type: [X] Initial Report  [ ] Amendment
- Date of Report Being Amended: ____
- Filed stamp: DEC 07 2020; LEGISLATIVE RESOURCE CENTER; 2020 DEC 16 AM 11:57; OFFICE OF THE CLERK, U.S. HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES (For Official Use Only)
- "A $200 penalty shall be assessed against anyone who files more than 30 days late."

Transaction grid header present (FULL ASSET NAME; TYPE OF TRANSACTION: Purchase/Sale/Exchange; DATE OF TRANSACTION; DATE NOTIFIED OF TRANSACTION; AMOUNT OF TRANSACTION columns A–K). Example row (ignored): Mega Corp. Common Stock. First data line reads "Please see the attached" — transactions are on attached pages.
